{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Indirial's medallion
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Indirial]] wears a gold coin medallion with a nearly black amethyst embedded in the center.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
